meta.title: Dor Ariel — Full-Stack Developer & Implementation Engineer
meta.description: Full-Stack Developer and Technical Implementation Engineer building scalable apps, cloud solutions, and automation platforms.

hero.name: Dor Ariel
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer & Technical Implementation Engineer bridging cloud infrastructure and user-facing products.

about.title: From infrastructure to interface — end to end.
about.paragraph: I'm a Full-Stack Developer and Technical Implementation Engineer with a strong background in DevOps and cloud infrastructure. I enjoy building scalable applications, automating complex workflows, and turning business requirements into reliable technical solutions. My unique strength is understanding both software development and the infrastructure that powers it.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Development
fullstack.desc: React + TypeScript on the front, Python and Node on the back. APIs, dashboards, internal tools.

cloud.title: Cloud & Platform
cloud.desc: AWS, Azure and GCP. Designing platforms that scale, with cost and reliability in mind.

automation.title: Automation & DevOps
automation.desc: CI/CD, IaC with Terraform, Kubernetes, and pipelines that ship safely and fast.

implementation.title: Technical Implementation
implementation.desc: Translating business requirements into working systems — and the docs that keep them alive.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Years of bridging infrastructure and product. A short timeline of recent chapters.

points: Designing and shipping end-to-end web applications with React, TypeScript, Node.js and Python.
Building automation tools and integrations on top of Azure Functions and serverless infrastructure.
Owning delivery from requirements gathering through deployment, monitoring and post-launch iteration.
Designed scalable Kubernetes platforms across AWS, Azure and GCP for production workloads.
Authored Terraform modules and CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, Bitbucket) used by multiple teams.
Reduced deploy times and incident rates through standardized observability and IaC patterns.
Hands-on Linux administration, scripting and automation across hybrid environments.
Built the foundation that later evolved into platform engineering and full-stack development.

stack.title: Tools I use to ship.
stack.subtitle: A pragmatic toolbox refined over years across product and platform work.

works.title: Projects
works.subtitle: A selection of recent and ongoing work — from internal platforms to side projects.

items.name: Cloud Ops Console
items.description: Internal full-stack platform that unifies cloud cost, deployment status and on-call signals across AWS, Azure and GCP — replacing five separate dashboards.

items.name: Pipeline Automation Suite
items.description: Reusable Azure DevOps and Bitbucket pipelines with Terraform-driven infrastructure, secrets management and automated rollback — adopted across multiple product teams.

items.name: Implementation Portal
items.description: Customer-facing onboarding portal that turns implementation checklists into a guided product experience, with role-based access and audit trails.

items.name: Serverless Data Sync
items.description: Event-driven sync layer built on Azure Functions and queues, moving and reconciling records between SaaS systems with retries, dead-letter handling and observability.

contact.title: Let's build something solid.
contact.subtitle: Have a project, role or idea in mind? The fastest way to reach me is the form below or directly via email.
